title: Client-Only Laptop Posture Confirmation
objective: Confirm, in a bounded evidence packet, whether the field laptop can now be treated as a client-only access, review, approval, and emergency fallback surface while durable repo, toolchain, validation, secrets, and mutable development state remain on the Olares host.
active_role: Olares Developer Residency Client-Only Posture Confirmation Operator
dependency_note: Packet 007 selected opening this later bounded confirmation packet after Packet 006 publication continuity proof. Packet 008 may confirm the client-only posture only; it does not reopen resumed feature delivery.
required_inputs: Published Dev Residency Packet 001 through Packet 006 authority chain
Packet 007 decision selecting a later bounded client-only laptop posture confirmation packet
The milestone-plan acceptance criteria for Milestone 4 client-only laptop posture
Current host mirror and approved private access path evidence
confirmation_scope: Confirm the laptop can attach to Olares through approved private client paths such as private-mesh SSH, VS Code Remote-SSH, or browser-terminal fallback.
Confirm `/home/olares/code/apex` remains the authoritative host mirror and active implementation path.
Confirm required durable repo, toolchain, validation, secrets, mutable data, and recovery boundaries are not laptop-only.
Record whether the client-only posture is pass, fail, or blocked with exact missing evidence.
explicit_no_go_items: new toolchain materialization or validation retry
success_criteria: Approved laptop-to-Olares client access is evidenced.
The laptop is not the only holder of active repo state, secrets, mutable development state, recovery material, toolchains, or validation context.
Host mirror path authority remains `/home/olares/code/apex` and active implementation remains `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform`.
No public ingress or hosting transition is required for the client-only posture.
Resumed feature delivery remains a later separate decision gate.
sql_permission_note: No database writes are authorized. This packet authorizes only bounded client-only posture confirmation and no product feature delivery, source/test mutation, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, or clean.
closure_note: Not yet executed. Packet 008 is authored as the bounded confirmation successor selected by Packet 007.
next_action: Execute this packet as the client-only laptop posture confirmation gate before any resumed feature-delivery readiness decision is opened.
